title: The Final Theorem
description: The ultimate test for Adepts seeking to join the Inner Circle: solve the Theorem of Infinite Recursion, a magical problem that has stumped the guild's greatest minds for centuries. You must prove mastery of multiple schools of magic, solve complex arcane puzzles, and demonstrate your worthiness to stand among the Magisters.

objectives.notes: Cast fire, ice, and lightning spells in sequence

objectives.description: Demonstrate mastery of pure Arcane magic
Solve the Theorem of Infinite Recursion
objectives.notes: Complex magical puzzle requiring all schools

objectives.description: Perform an impressive magical feat before the council

notes: Final Adept quest. Multi-stage trial testing all magic schools. Completion qualifies for Magister rank.
